creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Jin-Sih,

thanks for submitting this update, however I had some compilation
issues on both 8.3 and 9.0 as shown in the following logs:

https://redports.org/~culot/20120918091353-21992-68216/node-devel-0.9.2.log
https://redports.org/~culot/20120918091353-21992-68217/node-devel-0.9.2.log

On 10.0 everything builds fine:

https://redports.org/~culot/20120918091353-21992-68215/node-devel-0.9.2.log

Could you please have a look at the above logs?

Thanks,
Frederic
